title: U Stock Unity Software (U, $43.82) soared +74.37% and reached a 3-month high
author: tickeron_community
selftext: [Unity Software](https://tickeron.com/ticker/U/) ([U](https://tickeron.com/ticker/U/), $43.82) gained +74.37% and reached a new high over the last three months. By comparison, the broader [Packaged Software](https://tickeron.com/tags/all/Industry-PackagedSoftware) Industry returned 0.74% over the same period of time. A.I.dvisor analyzed 410 stocks in the [Packaged Software](https://tickeron.com/tags/all/Industry-PackagedSoftware) Industry over the same period of time and found that 201 of them (49.01%) were in an Uptrend while 209 of them (50.99%) showed a Downtrend.
